case.title: FIREMEN'S INS. CO. OF NEWARK, N.J. v. CONWAY

opinion.h1: FIREMEN'S INS. CO. OF NEWARK, N.J. v. CONWAY, 278 U.S. 580 (1929)
opinion.h2: FIREMEN'S INSURANCE COMPANY OF NEWARK, NEW JERSEY, appellant, v. Albert CONWAY, as Superintendent of
Insurance of the State of New York.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Affirmed on the authority of Meccano, Ltd., v. Wanamaker, 253 U.S. 136, 141, 40 S. Ct. 463; Chicago, Great Western Ry. v. Kendall, 266 U.S. 94, 100, 45 S. Ct. 55; Foster-Fountain Packing Co. v. Haydel (No. 68) 278 U.S. 1, 49 S. Ct. 18 73 L. Ed. -, decided October 15, 1928.
